_comment: AUDIT TEST CASE: REF/ENCL overflow visual test - entries exceed page width (540pt usable) to verify no wrapping implementation
subj: AUDIT TEST FOR REFERENCE AND ENCLOSURE OVERFLOW BEHAVIOR WHEN ENTRY TEXT EXCEEDS PAGE WIDTH
ref: (a) SECNAV M-5216.5 Chapter 2 with extensive supplementary material covering records management procedures and classification guidelines
(b) MCO 5216.11 which provides detailed guidance on correspondence preparation and formatting standards for all Department of the Navy activities
(c) NAVADMIN 2024/156 announcing updates to the records management system implementation timeline and mandatory training requirements for all personnel
(d) OPNAVINST 5215.17A establishing the Department of the Navy directives and records management program with comprehensive policy guidance
encl: (1) Records Management Procedures Manual with comprehensive guidance on filing and retrieval operations including cross-referencing systems and retention schedules
(2) Correspondence Preparation Handbook covering formatting standards for all types of military letters memoranda and official communications
(3) Implementation Timeline Chart showing key milestones for the new records management system deployment across all Navy and Marine Corps commands
(4) Training Schedule and Attendance Roster for upcoming records management certification courses required for all administrative personnel
body: 1. This audit test case verifies the visual behavior of REF and ENCL entries when their text content exceeds the usable page width of 540 points.
2. Each REF and ENCL entry above contains 120-180 characters of continuous text without manual line breaks to test overflow handling.
3. Expected behavior: text should exceed the right margin since no wrapping logic is implemented in the current renderer version.
